post.content:
**Status**: 3.5 YOE, Tier 1 college non-circuit Branch
**Position**: SDE2 at Non-FAANG
**Location**: India
**Date**: May 2022

Recruiter reached out. No OA or Phone Screen.

**Round 1 (DSA 60 mins)**
Similar to https://leetcode.com/problems/longest-increasing-path-in-a-matrix/.
Not directly presented as LC problem, some Uber scenario of cabs from a source to destination etc and have to extract the exact problem out of it. Basically, longest path in DAG, to be done with DFS and memoization.

**Round 2 (LLD 60 mins)**
Same as Interview 3 of this https://leetcode.com/discuss/interview-question/1657152/Uber-or-Software-Engineer-II-or-L4-or-Onsite-Interview-or-Nov-2021/1198620.

**Round 3 (HM 60 mins)**
Usual behavioural stuff - tell me about a time when you couldn't deliever a project on time, tell me about a time when you helped someone going out of comfort zone, tell me about a project you are most proud of, etc.

**Round 4 (HLD 60mins)**
First half, detailed discussion on a previous project. Design decisions taken, trade-offs made, results, impact, observability, future anticipations etc.
Second half, design something similar to Myntra with features like sort, filters, latest products, trending etc.

Got a call 2 days later of reject. Recruiter told not enough prior design experience.
can u please tell which app u used for lld and hld
